Title: AI for tomato harvest maturity detection
Finding: Computer vision can classify tomato maturity stages using colour and surface features
Context: Useful for low-cost decision support in warm-chain horticultural systems

Title: NIR spectroscopy for avocado maturity
Finding: NIR can estimate dry matter and oil content as indicators of harvest maturity
Context: Useful where non-destructive maturity testing is needed

Title: Smartphone tools for smallholder farmers
Finding: Smartphone-based tools can support harvest timing grading disease diagnosis and market readiness
Context: Relevant for resource-constrained LMIC farming systems

Title: Warm-chain losses in fresh produce
Finding: Warm-chain conditions increase respiration water loss microbial decay and quality deterioration
Context: Important in systems with limited cold storage

Title: Machine learning for fruit quality prediction
Finding: Machine learning models can link visual spectral and physiological indicators to maturity and quality
Context: Useful for predicting shelf life and market suitability

Title: Low-cost AI for agricultural decision support
Finding: Offline and lightweight AI models may support farmers where internet connectivity is weak
Context: Relevant for rural and resource-limited environments

Title: Edible coatings for tomato shelf life
Finding: Edible coatings reduce moisture loss slow respiration delay ripening and limit microbial decay
Context: Useful for reducing postharvest losses after harvest

Title: Hyperspectral imaging for fruit maturity
Finding: Hyperspectral data can detect internal and external maturity-related quality traits
Context: Useful for high-accuracy research and commercial grading systems

Title: Barriers to AI use in LMIC agriculture
Finding: High cost limited connectivity weak extension support and low technical capacity reduce AI adoption
Context: Important for designing inclusive AI tools

Title: AI-enabled harvest decision systems
Finding: AI tools reduce losses only when linked to practical decisions such as when to harvest sort sell and handle produce
